title: Protocol Snow-Proof (No Back Regrets)
notes: Solid 60 min session. Back-friendly (no heavy hinge) to stay fresh for snow shoveling and Sculpt later. Tomorrow can go heavy/long.

warmup.description: Start with 2-mile run then dynamic reset (not logged as warmup work)

blocks.name: 2-Mile Run
blocks.instructions: Not a time trial. Ramp 0.5 mi easy, 1.0 mi steady, 0.5 mi strong but controlled.

exercises.name: Run - 2 miles
exercises.notes: Target today: 16:30-18:00. Smooth cadence, relaxed shoulders.

blocks.name: Upper + Single-Leg Strength
blocks.instructions: 4 rounds quality. Rest 60-90 sec between rounds.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported DB Row (incline bench)
exercises.notes: Chest glued to bench. No torso swing.

exercises.name: DB Step-Ups (24 inch box)
exercises.notes: Full foot on box. Drive through midfoot. No bouncing.

exercises.name: Pallof Press (band)
exercises.notes: 2-sec pause each rep. Ribs down, glutes on.

blocks.name: HRP + Shoulder EMOM
blocks.instructions: EMOM 12. Odd minutes: HRP. Even minutes: DB Z-Press. Pick loads you can hold all rounds.

exercises.name: Hand-Release Pushups (HRP)
exercises.notes: Odd minutes only. Stop 1-2 reps shy of failure.

exercises.name: DB Z-Press (seated on floor)
exercises.notes: Even minutes only. Tall posture, no lean-back.
